_purpose: Core page shortcuts shown in the 'Where to go next' grid on the onboarding page. page_id maps to GuiPage variants (chat, profile, wallet, tasks, market, maps, settings, notes). Add new entries here when new pages should be promoted.

pages.label: Chat
pages.description: Text, voice, video. Encrypted DMs, channels, servers.

pages.label: Profile
pages.description: Your name, avatar, bio, skills. Seen by others across the network.

pages.label: Wallet
pages.description: Optional Solana wallet derived from your seed. Send, receive, stake, tip. Decoupled from identity — not required to use HumanityOS.

pages.label: Tasks
pages.description: Kanban boards for projects, teams, personal life.

pages.label: Maps
pages.description: Local to galactic scale. Real navigation or sim exploration.

pages.label: Notes
pages.description: Encrypted notes for journals, drafts, anything private.
